body: Sandbox follow-up for Sepo relay API support. acpx selects ACP auth methods using ACPX_AUTH_<METHOD_ID>; Codex advertises codex-api-key/openai-api-key, so this bridges the existing OPENAI_API_KEY input into ACPX_AUTH_CODEX_API_KEY and ACPX_AUTH_OPENAI_API_KEY in addition to OPENAI_API_KEY/CODEX_API_KEY. Verified: npm ci --ignore-scripts, npm run build, npm test, and targeted dist smoke.
title: Bridge Codex ACP auth env for relay credentials
